objectTypes.comment: An abstract base class that will be inherited by the extern object type, showing how to mix generated and hand-written code.
objectTypes.name: AbstractBaseClassForExternClass

objectTypes.comment:
Node shape that serves as an abstract base class for child node shapes.

It's marked abstract in TypeScript and not exported from the module.

Common pattern: put the minting strategy and nodeKind on an ABC.
objectTypes.name: AbstractBaseClassWithProperties

objectTypes.comment: Abstract base for other node shapes. Put the ABC with properties above the ABC without.
objectTypes.name: AbstractBaseClassWithoutProperties

objectTypes.comment: Base interface for other node shapes.
objectTypes.name: BaseInterfaceWithProperties

objectTypes.comment: Base interface for other node shapes. Put the base interface with properties above the base interface without.
objectTypes.name: BaseInterfaceWithoutProperties

objectTypes.comment:
Shape with custom rdf:type's.

The shaclmate:fromRdfType is expected on deserialization.
shaclmate:toRdfType's are added an serialization.
objectTypes.name: ExplicitFromToRdfTypesClass

objectTypes.comment:
Shape with custom rdf:type's.

The shaclmate:rdfType is expected on deserialization and added on serialization.
